tests.description: RED backend service-boundary tests for CSAAS signal loading, hard timeout fallback, malformed/no-data/error degradation, and tenant scoping.
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: CSAAS IT maturity and compliance signals inside threshold are included as enterprise recommendation context.
AC2: No data, malformed data, missing organization, thrown errors, and timeout degrade to generic mode without failing Quick Consult.
AC1-AC2: Tenant scoping prevents cross-tenant signal inference and raw signal leakage.

tests.description: RED backend orchestration tests for Quick Consult enterprise context response contract, generic fallback preservation, low-completeness prompt, trusted tenant/organization scoping, and privacy-safe metadata/audit markers.
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: Quick Consult includes available enterprise signals and returns a visible enterprise recommendation context contract.
AC2: CSAAS no data, errors, malformed data, missing organization, and timeout return generic mode while preserving normal analysis and recommendations.
AC3: Low enterprise background completeness returns a non-blocking context completion prompt.
AC1-AC2: Browser-supplied tenant, organization, and signal data are ignored; metadata and audit contain status/count/source markers only.

tests.description: RED backend recommendation-unit tests for applying enterprise signal summaries, preserving generic fallback ranking, and returning a non-blocking low-completeness prompt.
acceptance_criteria_covered: AC1: Recommendation generation applies CSAAS maturity/compliance signals through safe context and visible rationale.
AC2: Degraded CSAAS signals preserve generic recommendation mode and normal classification-driven ranking.
AC3: Low completeness returns context completion guidance without suppressing recommendation cards.

summary: Generated 10 skipped RED backend/API/service tests for Story 3.7 covering CSAAS enterprise signals, generic fallback, low-completeness prompts, tenant scoping, and privacy-safe metadata/audit markers.
